prediction_reason.历年位次与招生计划: 2021–2025年最低位次约1490→1476→1436→1401→1292，整体呈波动上升趋势（位次数字减小，竞争加剧），近2年累计前移约109名；2025年基准约1292名，为近5 年最高水平；本省计划2021年26人，2022–2025年均为25人；2026年计划27人，较2025年扩招2人（+8%），扩招使竞争略有缓和，但幅度有限。
prediction_reason.学校层次与声誉: 985、211、双一流；软科主榜约第34名，近年排名稳定在33–34名，属于全国顶尖高校，对考生有持续吸引力；2026年声誉评价偏负面（实验室安全事 件），但抖音热度排名23（较热），整体关注度较高；历史未见明显投档断档记录；土木工程A+、机械工程A-、环境科学与工程A-、电气工程A-、风景园林学A- ，工科实力突出，电气、机械等王牌专业对高分考生吸引力强。
prediction_reason.专业热度与地域: 计算机类、电子信息/通信、电气工程等专业持续高热推荐，与该校优势工科方向高度契 合，推高相关专业组竞争热度；本省2026年考生数预估约78000人，较2025年67408人增加约15.7%，竞争显著加剧；重庆大学位 于重庆市，作为西南地区顶尖985，对全国考生均有较强吸引力。
prediction_reason.预测结论: 综合历年位次波动上升趋势、2026年计划小幅扩招及本 省考生大幅增加，在2025年基准1292名基础上预计竞争略加剧；扩招缓和效应被考生增长部分抵消，预测最低位次约1334名，区间1134–1534名。

major_tier_recommendation.tier_1:
一档（最难进）
- 电气工程及其自动化
- 工科试验班（卓越计划）（含电气、计算机、人工智能等）
- 工科试验班（未来信息）（含通信工程、自动化、电子信息等）
- 工科试验班（计算机与智能软件）（含计算机、软件、人工智能等）
major_tier_recommendation.tier_2:
二档（中等）
- 工科试验班（高端装备与智能制造）（含机械、车辆、航空航天等）
- 理科试验班（数理基础）（含数学、物理、统计等）
- 人文科学试验班（法学新闻类）（含法学、新闻学）
major_tier_recommendation.tier_3:
三档（相对好进）
- 工科试验班（智慧能源与先进材料）（含能源、材料等）
- 工科试验班（医工交叉与环化健康）（含生物医学、环境、化工等）
major_tier_recommendation.overall_advice: 位次在预测区间1134–1534名内，建议以二档专业为主力报考方向，一档专业作为冲刺目标，三档专业作为稳妥保底。位次明显优于区间下限（如1134名以内）可重点冲刺一档王 牌专业（电气、卓越计划、计算机类）；位次接近区间上限（1534名附近）应以三档专业为主确保录取。

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum ranking was approximately 1490 → 1476 → 1436 → 1401 → 1292, showing an overall fluctuating upward trend (ranking number decreases, competition intensifies), with a cumulative advance of about 109 places in the last two years; the 2025 baseline is approximately 1292, the highest level in the past five years; the provincial plan was 26 students in 2021, and 25 students from 2022 to 2025; the 2026 plan is 27 students, an increase of 2 students (+8%) compared to 2025, which slightly eases competition but to a limited extent.

学校层次与声誉.title: School Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: 985, 211, Double First-Class; ranked approximately 34th on the Soft Science main list, with a stable ranking of 33–34 in recent years, belonging to the top universities nationwide, with sustained appeal to candidates; the 2026 reputation evaluation is slightly negative (laboratory safety incident), but Douyin popularity ranks 23rd (relatively hot), with overall high attention; no significant historical record of enrollment gaps; Civil Engineering A+, Mechanical Engineering A-, Environmental Science and Engineering A-, Electrical Engineering A-, Landscape Architecture A-, with outstanding engineering strength, and flagship majors such as Electrical Engineering and Mechanical Engineering strongly attract high-scoring candidates.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Majors such as Computer Science, Electronic Information/Communication, and Electrical Engineering continue to be highly recommended, closely aligning with the university's advantageous engineering fields, driving up competition for related major groups; the estimated number of candidates in the province for 2026 is about 78,000, an increase of approximately 15.7% from 67,408 in 2025, significantly intensifying competition; Chongqing University is located in Chongqing, as a top 985 in the Southwest region, it has strong appeal to candidates nationwide.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the fluctuating upward trend in historical rankings, the slight expansion of the 2026 plan, and the significant increase in provincial candidates, competition is expected to intensify slightly based on the 2025 baseline of 1292; the easing effect of expansion is partially offset by the increase in candidates, predicting a minimum ranking of approximately 1334, with a range of 1134–1534.

major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_1:
Tier 1 (Most Difficult to Enter)
- Electrical Engineering and Automation
- Engineering Experimental Class (Excellence Plan) (including Electrical Engineering, Computer Science, Artificial Intelligence, etc.)
- Engineering Experimental Class (Future Information) (including Communication Engineering, Automation, Electronic Information, etc.)
- Engineering Experimental Class (Computer and Intelligent Software) (including Computer Science, Software, Artificial Intelligence, etc.)
major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_2:
Tier 2 (Medium)
- Engineering Experimental Class (High-End Equipment and Intelligent Manufacturing) (including Mechanical Engineering, Vehicle Engineering, Aerospace, etc.)
- Science Experimental Class (Mathematics and Physics Foundation) (including Mathematics, Physics, Statistics, etc.)
- Humanities and Social Sciences Experimental Class (Law and Journalism) (including Law, Journalism)
major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_3:
Tier 3 (Relatively Easy to Enter)
- Engineering Experimental Class (Smart Energy and Advanced Materials) (including Energy, Materials, etc.)
- Engineering Experimental Class (Medical-Engineering Cross and Environmental-Chemical Health) (including Biomedical Engineering, Environment, Chemical Engineering, etc.)
major_tier_recommendation_en.overall_advice: For rankings within the predicted range of 1134–1534, it is recommended to focus on Tier 2 majors as the main application direction, Tier 1 majors as sprint targets, and Tier 3 majors as safe backups. If the ranking is significantly better than the lower limit of the range (e.g., within 1134), you can focus on sprinting for Tier 1 flagship majors (Electrical Engineering, Excellence Plan, Computer Science); if the ranking is close to the upper limit of the range (around 1534), you should mainly rely on Tier 3 majors to ensure admission.
